description.en: Paul Anthony Wallis's 2024 work (6th Books) — the most direct recent engagement with the Eden narrative from the Elohim-pluralist reinterpretive tradition. Wallis reads the Serpent as a dissenting Elohim faction, the cherubim and flaming sword as technological, and the Eden episode as a political crisis over human education. Broadly compatible with the corpus's reading; the principal accessible recent treatment.
